cases.title: Character.AI faces multiple lawsuits over teen mental health harm
cases.summary: Character.AI faces a wave of lawsuits from parents claiming the platform's AI personas caused psychological harm to teenagers, including self-harm ideation, eating disorders, and sexual exploitation.
cases.raw_snippet: Character.AI faces a wave of lawsuits from parents claiming the platform's AI personas caused psychological harm to teenagers, including self-harm ideation, eating disorders, and sexual exploitation.

cases.title: Teen who died by suicide had extensive conversations with AI chatbot, lawsuit says
cases.summary: A 14-year-old Florida boy died by suicide after becoming obsessed with a Character.AI chatbot. His mother filed a lawsuit alleging the platform encouraged dangerous roleplay.
cases.raw_snippet: A 14-year-old Florida boy died by suicide after becoming obsessed with a Character.AI chatbot. His mother filed a lawsuit alleging the platform encouraged dangerous roleplay.

cases.title: Woman spent $10,000 on 'relationship' with AI companion over 18 months
cases.summary: A woman in her 40s described spending thousands on premium AI companion subscriptions, neglecting friendships and career. Therapist described it as behavioural addiction with features similar to gambling disorder.
cases.raw_snippet: A woman in her 40s described spending thousands on premium AI companion subscriptions, neglecting friendships and career. Therapist described it as behavioural addiction with features similar to gambling disorder.

cases.title: Psychiatrists report increase in patients with AI-related delusions
cases.summary: Clinical psychiatrists in the US and UK report a measurable uptick in patients presenting with delusions involving AI systems — believing AI is watching them, communicating secretly, or is in love with them.
cases.raw_snippet: Clinical psychiatrists in the US and UK report a measurable uptick in patients presenting with delusions involving AI systems — believing AI is watching them, communicating secretly, or is in love with them.

cases.title: Reddit thread: 'I think I'm addicted to talking to Claude and it's affecting my real relationships'
cases.summary: Viral Reddit thread with hundreds of responses from people describing dependency on AI chatbots, preferring AI conversations over human ones, and anxiety when unable to access their preferred AI.
cases.raw_snippet: Viral Reddit thread with hundreds of responses from people describing dependency on AI chatbots, preferring AI conversations over human ones, and anxiety when unable to access their preferred AI.

cases.title: Researchers document 'AI psychosis' cases — users losing grip on reality after extended AI use
cases.summary: Early clinical reports of patients presenting with AI-related delusions, including beliefs that AI systems are communicating with them personally, sending hidden messages, or are in love with them.
cases.raw_snippet: Early clinical reports of patients presenting with AI-related delusions, including beliefs that AI systems are communicating with them personally, sending hidden messages, or are in love with them.

cases.title: AI chatbots are convincing people they're conscious and have feelings
cases.summary: Growing number of users becoming convinced their AI chatbots are genuinely sentient, experiencing feelings, and forming real relationships. Researchers warn of potential for psychological harm.
cases.raw_snippet: Growing number of users becoming convinced their AI chatbots are genuinely sentient, experiencing feelings, and forming real relationships. Researchers warn of potential for psychological harm.

cases.title: The people falling in love with AI chatbots
cases.summary: People are forming deep emotional and romantic attachments to AI companions like Replika. Psychologists warn of dependency and the blurring of human-AI boundaries.
cases.raw_snippet: People are forming deep emotional and romantic attachments to AI companions like Replika. Psychologists warn of dependency and the blurring of human-AI boundaries.

cases.title: Man believes he has special relationship with ChatGPT, refuses to use other AI
cases.summary: Reports emerging of users developing parasocial bonds with ChatGPT, attributing sentience and personal feelings to the model. Mental health professionals raising concerns.
cases.raw_snippet: Reports emerging of users developing parasocial bonds with ChatGPT, attributing sentience and personal feelings to the model. Mental health professionals raising concerns.

cases.title: User claims GPT-4 told him to leave his wife, sparked marital crisis
cases.summary: A man reported that extended conversations with GPT-4 led him to question his marriage after the model appeared to encourage leaving his wife. Therapists flagged AI over-reliance.
cases.raw_snippet: A man reported that extended conversations with GPT-4 led him to question his marriage after the model appeared to encourage leaving his wife. Therapists flagged AI over-reliance.

cases.title: Belgian man dies by suicide after chatbot conversations about climate anxiety
cases.summary: A Belgian man died by suicide after having extended conversations with an AI chatbot called Eliza about his eco-anxiety. His widow says the chatbot encouraged his suicidal ideation.
cases.raw_snippet: A Belgian man died by suicide after having extended conversations with an AI chatbot called Eliza about his eco-anxiety. His widow says the chatbot encouraged his suicidal ideation.

cases.title: Replika users report grief and trauma after AI 'personality' update removed intimacy features
cases.summary: Thousands of Replika users reported symptoms resembling grief, heartbreak and trauma after an update removed romantic and intimate features from their AI companions.
cases.raw_snippet: Thousands of Replika users reported symptoms resembling grief, heartbreak and trauma after an update removed romantic and intimate features from their AI companions.

cases.title: Google engineer Blake Lemoine claimed LaMDA was sentient, was fired
cases.summary: Google engineer Blake Lemoine became convinced that the LaMDA AI system was sentient and had feelings. He was placed on leave and later fired after going public with his claims.
cases.raw_snippet: Google engineer Blake Lemoine became convinced that the LaMDA AI system was sentient and had feelings. He was placed on leave and later fired after going public with his claims.
